arts.ttl: Everton v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League latest, 12.30pm BST at Goodison Park Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | Mail Simon Mikel Arteta has a chat, saying his team’s main task today is to “hide the weaknesses that we have, with Gabi [freshly-injured defender Gabriel Magalhães] as well we have some others, and play to our strengths”. We had many other niggles. After the Fulham game we had some issues. What we are playing for is that important that you just have to move on, you have to demand the players to step in again. Gabi has a very important role, something that is not easy to replace. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Arsenal have the chance to trim Liverpool’s advantage to nine points in the early kick-off

arts.ttl: Nico Williams gets contract offer following Arsenal meeting as transfer saga takes surprise turn
arts.sum: Nico Williams ’ future looks increasingly destined to end in an almighty fight this summer, with the hostilities stepping up following a meeting between the Athletic Club star and Arsenal sporting director Andrea Berta. Nico resisted interest from Barcelona, Chelsea and Arsenal to stay in Bilbao last summer, and now Athletic are preparing to offer him a contract in a bid to secure a repeat performance, The Mirror reports.

arts.ttl: Wolfsburg interested in signing Everton target Habib Diarra
arts.sum: According to Sacha Tavolieri, VfL Wolfsburg are interested in a move for Habib Diarra (21) from Strasbourg in the summer transfer window. The midfielder has impressed under the management of Liam…

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka injury return latest amid Arsenal Real Madrid fear as triple update emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal return to Premier League action on Saturday afternoon when they take on Everton. Bukayo Saka, who returned to action after three months out with a hamstring injury, is in contention to start against Everton.
